rulings.Rulings: American Contractors Indemnity Company's Motion for Enforcement of Judgment is granted in part and denied in part. American Contractors Indemnity Company is awarded $118,320.40 in reimbursement of judgment award paid to Mr. Bassin; $5,594 for costs and attorney's fees incurred; and 10% interest per annum on both the reimbursement and costs and attorney's fees, calculated from the date this Motion was filed, July 31, 2017, to the hearing date on this Motion, September 21, 2017, for a total of $1,765.35 in interest. Total judgment award to American Contractors Indemnity Company in the amount of $125,679.75. American Contractors Indemnity Company's request for $10,340 in allegedly unpaid annual bond premiums is denied for failure to sustain the burden of proof on the non-payment of annual bond premiums. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) and opposing parties no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, September 20, 2017.
